strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at current role
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, frameworks, and craftsmanship practices
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work dates back to 2018 or earlier
Cloud experience narrow — AWS CDK noted, but no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth in primary roles

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience

response.justification: Candidate brings extensive full-stack engineering experience well-aligned with the TypeScript/Node.js/React core stack, paired with directly relevant AI agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq. Testing rigor, architectural sensibility, and breadth across languages and platforms fit the role's craftsmanship orientation. Gaps include no documented Nest.js exposure and dated Kotlin/Java work, which may require ramp-up on the secondary backend stack.
